description: Create a two-column content slide on how remote work influences laptop luggers' travel habits, with a narrative headline on the left and a comparison table by generation on the right.

header.headline: Over 80% of Gen Z and millennial laptop luggers say that remote working has affected their general travel habits. Gen X travel habits have not changed as much.

left.body: Over 80% of Gen Z and millennial laptop luggers say that remote working has affected their general travel habits. Gen X travel habits have not changed as much.

rows: Remote working has impacted travel habits
Frequent short trips in the year

footer.source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Question: “How has remote work affected your travel habits?” (Select all that apply) (n = 620 laptop luggers); Boomers are excluded from this slide because of their low propensity to mix work and travel.
